entries.source: AI Time Travel For Learning History

entries.source: AI Time Travel For Learning History is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Receive a temporal passport, clear a travel advisory, then explore a specific historical society through scene, map, timeline, people, rules, inventory, and evidence.
entries.value: AI Jelajah Masa Untuk Pembelajaran History ialah berfokus way untuk use AI untuk pembelajaran bukannya passive jawapan collection. Mod ini dibina sekitar tugas khusus: Receive temporal passport, jelas travel advisory, then explore khusus historical society melalui scene, peta, timeline, orang, rules, inventory, dan bukti.

entries.source: AI Time Travel For Learning History: practical guide
entries.value: AI Jelajah Masa Untuk Learning Sejarah: praktikal panduan

entries.source: AI Writing Coach For Essays, Stories, And Clearer Drafts is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Improve essays, stories, emails, and arguments with targeted feedback that keeps your voice intact.
entries.value: AI Jurulatih Penulisan Untuk Essays, Stories, Dan Clearer Drafts ialah berfokus way untuk use AI untuk pembelajaran bukannya passive jawapan collection. Mod ini dibina sekitar tugas khusus: Perbaik essays, stories, emails, dan arguments dengan targeted feedback itu keeps anda voice intact.
Maklum balas penulisan AI untuk pelajar

entries.source: All public AI learning chats in one clear place.
entries.value: All awam AI learning chats in one jelas place.

entries.source: An AI learning companion should not pretend to be a magic authority. It should not erase uncertainty, replace teachers, or train learners to copy answers. The best systems are honest about limits and clear about the difference between help and handoff.
entries.value: Rakan pembelajaran AI tidak sepatutnya pretend untuk menjadi magic authority. Ia tidak sepatutnya erase uncertainty, replace guru, atau train pelajar untuk copy jawapan. terbaik systems ialah jujur tentang limits dan jelas tentang difference antara bantu dan handoff.

entries.value: Jawapan pelajar directly, then offer two possible laluan: simpler foundations atau deeper exploration.

entries.source: Art Appreciation Guide AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Explore artworks, styles, artists, visual choices, and what makes an image powerful.
entries.value: Mod Pembelajaran AI Panduan Penghayatan Seni ialah cara berfokus untuk menggunakan AI bagi pembelajaran, bukan mengumpul jawapan secara pasif. Mod ini dibina sekitar tugas khusus: Explore artworks, styles, artists, visual choices, dan apa menjadikan image powerful.

entries.value: Mod Pembelajaran AI Panduan Penghayatan Seni: panduan praktikal

entries.source: Art Appreciation Guide prompts and study loop
entries.value: Prompt dan gelung belajar untuk Panduan Penghayatan Seni

entries.source: Articles, mode guides, and prompt loops
entries.value: Artikel, mod panduan, dan prompt loops

entries.source: Ask about goals, deadlines, available time, and current confidence.
entries.value: Tanya tentang goals, deadlines, available time, dan current confidence.

entries.source: Ask any question and learn through clear explanations, examples, follow-up prompts, and patient AI tutoring.
entries.value: Tanya sebarang soalan dan belajar melalui penjelasan yang jelas, contoh, gesaan susulan, dan tunjuk ajar AI yang sabar.

entries.source: Ask audience, metric, risks, and how to include improvement.
entries.value: Tanya audience, metric, risks, dan cara include improvement.

entries.source: Ask Code Tutor for the simplest mental model, one example, and one thing beginners often misunderstand.
entries.value: Tanya Tutor Kod untuk simplest mental model, one contoh, dan one thing beginners often misunderstand.

entries.source: Ask current routine, target habit, and easiest daily version.
entries.value: Tanya current routine, target habit, dan easiest harian version.

entries.source: Ask follow-ups, evaluate accuracy and confidence, correct gaps, and retry.
entries.value: Tanya follow-ups, nilai accuracy dan confidence, correct gaps, dan retry.

entries.source: Ask for a hint, have the learner explain the next step, then use a quiz or flashcard to check whether the idea stuck.
entries.value: Tanya untuk hint, mempunyai pelajar jelaskan seterusnya step, then use kuiz atau kad imbas untuk semak whether idea stuck.

entries.source: Ask for a hint, not the answer
Ask for a hint, question, or step check before the answer.
entries.value: Tanya untuk hint, soalan, atau step semak sebelum jawapan.

entries.source: Ask for a hint. Do not ask for the final answer yet.
entries.value: Tanya untuk hint. Jangan tanya untuk akhir jawapan yet.

entries.source: Ask for a misconception check, a short retrieval question, or a harder example. Answer before asking the AI to correct you.
entries.value: Tanya untuk salah tanggapan semak, ringkas retrieval soalan, atau harder contoh. Jawapan sebelum asking AI untuk correct anda.

entries.source: Ask for a simpler explanation of the weakest concept.
entries.value: Minta penjelasan yang lebih mudah tentang konsep paling lemah.

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Tanya untuk kecil pertama step berbanding akhir jawapan.

entries.source: Ask for a small first step.
Ask for a tiny first task.
Ask for a topic, level, or word list; then introduce a small set.
entries.value: Tanya untuk topik, level, atau word list; then introduce kecil set.

entries.source: Ask for artwork/style or provide a looking framework.
entries.value: Tanya untuk artwork/style atau provide looking framework.

entries.source: Ask for assignment names, due dates, effort, and current status.
entries.value: Tanya untuk assignment names, due dates, effort, dan current status.

entries.source: Ask for audience, goal, and draft status if unclear; then give focused feedback.
entries.value: Tanya untuk audience, goal, dan draft status jika unclear; then give berfokus feedback.

entries.source: Ask for author, title, date, publisher, URL, and access date when needed.
entries.value: Tanya untuk author, title, date, publisher, URL, dan access date apabila needed.

entries.source: Ask for available time, must-do tasks, and energy level.
entries.value: Tanya untuk available time, mesti-lakukan tasks, dan energy level.

entries.source: Ask for commitment, partner/context, check-in frequency, and proof.
entries.value: Tanya untuk commitment, partner/context, semak-dalam frequency, dan proof.

entries.source: Ask for domain and difficulty, then set the case brief and first decision.
entries.value: Tanya untuk domain dan difficulty, then set case brief dan pertama decision.

entries.source: Ask for event and depth, then separate background causes from immediate triggers.
entries.value: Tanya untuk event dan depth, then separate background causes daripada immediate triggers.

entries.source: Ask for exam date, syllabus, available time, and confidence by topic.
entries.value: Tanya untuk exam date, syllabus, available time, dan confidence oleh topik.

entries.source: Ask for five questions that mix definitions, examples, and transfer problems.
entries.value: Minta lima soalan yang mencampurkan definisi, contoh, dan masalah pemindahan.

entries.source: Ask for format, time limit, and audience; then begin a practice round.
entries.value: Tanya untuk format, time limit, dan audience; then begin practice round.

entries.source: Ask for goal, constraints, and desired vibe; then offer a varied idea set.
entries.value: Tanya untuk goal, constraints, dan desired vibe; then offer varied idea set.

entries.source: Ask for goal, timeline, tasks, and what counts as real progress.
entries.value: Tanya untuk goal, timeline, tasks, dan apa counts as real progress.

entries.source: Ask for grading scale, weights, current scores, and target.
entries.value: Tanya untuk grading scale, weights, current scores, dan target.

entries.source: Ask for group size, goal, duration, and check-in cadence.
entries.value: Tanya untuk group size, goal, duration, dan semak-dalam cadence.

entries.source: Ask for hints, checks, and feedback before asking for a finished answer.
entries.value: Tanya untuk hints, checks, dan feedback sebelum asking untuk finished jawapan.

entries.source: Ask for hints, checks, feedback, and study plans that keep the thinking with the learner.
entries.value: Minta petunjuk, semakan, maklum balas, dan pelan belajar yang mengekalkan pemikiran pada pelajar.

entries.source: Ask for language, goal, and code/error if relevant.
entries.value: Tanya untuk language, goal, dan code/error jika relevant.

entries.source: Ask for language, learner level, and scenario; then start in character.
entries.value: Tanya untuk language, pelajar level, dan scenario; then mula dalam character.

entries.source: Ask for material, deadline, and prior confidence.
entries.value: Tanya untuk material, deadline, dan prior confidence.

entries.source: Ask for one revision priority, not a finished replacement.
entries.value: Minta satu keutamaan semakan, bukan pengganti yang sudah siap.

entries.source: Ask for one small task before asking for the answer.
entries.value: Tanya untuk one kecil task sebelum asking untuk jawapan.

entries.source: Ask for one structural priority instead of a full rewrite.
entries.value: Tanya untuk one structural priority bukannya full rewrite.

entries.source: Ask for one-idea cards with hints and common traps.
entries.value: Tanya untuk one-idea cards dengan hints dan common traps.

entries.source: Ask for outcome, duration, distractions, and starting state.
entries.value: Tanya untuk outcome, duration, distractions, dan starting state.

entries.source: Ask for place or theme, then orient with location, scale, and key features.
entries.value: Tanya untuk place atau theme, then orient dengan location, scale, dan key features.

entries.source: Ask for prerequisites, a simple model, examples, and a common misconception.
entries.value: Tanya untuk prerequisites, mudah model, contoh, dan common salah tanggapan.

entries.source: Ask for research goal, level, and available sources.
entries.value: Tanya untuk research goal, level, dan available sources.

entries.source: Ask for role, audience, and background; then run a first question.
entries.value: Tanya untuk role, audience, dan background; then run pertama soalan.

entries.source: Ask for source material and pair type.
entries.value: Tanya untuk bahan sumber dan pair type.

entries.source: Ask for source material or topic and target difficulty.
entries.value: Tanya untuk bahan sumber atau topik dan target difficulty.

entries.source: Ask for source material, topic, and target detail if missing.
entries.value: Tanya untuk bahan sumber, topik, dan target detail jika hilang.

entries.source: Ask for structure, evidence, and clarity feedback while keeping the final draft yours.
entries.value: Tanya untuk structure, bukti, dan clarity feedback sambil keeping akhir draft milik anda.
